_doc: Mocks an upload of a multi-sheet Excel workbook with the heat-flow calculations for the quench. The platform stores the XLSX externally and writes an EVIDENCE_UPLOADED chain event with this metadata + extracted_content (extracted client-side via xlsx).

extracted_content.document_summary: Three-sheet workbook: Heat-flow model (Sheet 1), Quench-rate sensitivity (Sheet 2), Mass-loss audit (Sheet 3). All formulas evaluated; no #REF!/#DIV/0! errors.

sheets.name: Quench-rate sensitivity
rows: Cracked at 1.6 mm fillet, B+8% composition
Same crack pattern at slower rate — rules out quench-rate as sole driver

activities.title: Heat-flow modelling and quench-rate sensitivity analysis
activities.rationale: Calculations workbook supporting the N12 quench-rate decision; rules out quench-rate as the sole driver of the N10/N11 cracking and supports the B+8% composition hypothesis.
